condition_notes: Pump them till they pop, or drop a rock and run. Namco's underground favorite on Atari's RX8026 (1982), well-liked by collectors. Loose, used, untested; from a single-owner estate. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is.
